subject: [PATCH v6 09/15] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT plumbing

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch adds a new feature to userfaultfd, allowing userspace to track read-write protection (RWP) on memory ranges. It introduces two new ioctls: UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP and UFFDIO_RWPROTECT, which enable RWP tracking and allow installing or removing RWP on registered ranges. The patch also adds a capability bit, UFFD_FEATURE_RWP, to control access to this feature. The registration of RWP sets the VM_UFFD_RWP flag on the VMA, and re-registering a range without dropping existing per-PTE markers is prevented. This patch lays the groundwork for exposing the UAPI in a follow-up patch.
